question: Force Protection Condition DELTA means that your base is at which one of the following? (Introduction to Antiterrorism, Page 10)
canonical_answer:
-The least increased level of protection
-The most increased level of protection (correct)
-A medium level of protection

appears_in.title: Antiterrorism Post Test
appears_in.answer: The most increased level of protection

appears_in.title: Antiterrorism Scenario Training Page 2
appears_in.answer:
-The least increased level of protection
-The most increased level of protection (correct)
-A medium level of protection

appears_in.title: Army At Level 1
appears_in.answer: The most increased level of protection

appears_in.title: At Level 1 Test Answers
appears_in.answer: The most increased level of protection

appears_in.title: At Level 1 Training
appears_in.answer: The most increased level of protection

appears_in.title: Force Protection Delta Means
appears_in.answer: The most increased level of protection
